articles.title: Trevor Story reacts to strike three call that got Alex Cora ejected in Red Sox’ loss
articles.description:
"Just obviously disagreed with the call real strongly. I think a lot of people did."

The post Trevor Story reacts to strike three call that got Alex Cora ejected in Red Sox’ loss appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Trevor Story expressed strong disagreement with a controversial strike three call.
Manager Alex Cora was ejected from the game due to the call.
The loss impacts the Red Sox's standings as they compete for playoff positioning.

articles.title: Brimming with motivation after missing Olympics, Pavel Zacha is playing his best hockey for Bruins
articles.description:
"Last year wasn't as good as I wanted, too, and it kind of was motivation for all of us to get better.”

The post Brimming with motivation after missing Olympics, Pavel Zacha is playing his best hockey for Bruins appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Pavel Zacha is experiencing a career resurgence with the Bruins after missing the Olympics.
Zacha credits last year's performance as motivation to improve his game this season.
His improved play is contributing to the Bruins' success in the NHL this year.

articles.title: Here’s what Red Sox SP Sonny Gray said about his rough debut
articles.description:
“I just don’t feel like I put us in a good position to win the game, if I’m being honest.”

The post Here’s what Red Sox SP Sonny Gray said about his rough debut appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sonny Gray struggled in his Red Sox debut, expressing disappointment in his performance.
Gray allowed multiple runs, stating he didn't help the team win on March 28.
Fans are concerned about the team's pitching depth following Gray's rough start.
